differentials.name: Metastasis: melanoma (60%), RCC ◊  94% of benign lesions are < 10 mm; 88% of malignant lesions are > 10 mm ◊  Any polyp > 10 mm should be operated on ›  in a symptomatic patient ›  in a patient > 50 years of age ›  with coexisting gallstones or followed every 3-6 months for 1 year
